evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Internally consistent: betterAuth, prismaAdapter, magicLink plugin, toNextJsHandler, createAuthClient, magicLinkClient, authClient.signIn.magicLink and authClient.signIn.social all match published better-auth API surface. No version pinned but symbol naming is self-consistent across server, client, and UI.
evidence.executability: Fenced blocks parse as valid TS/TSX. One minor gap: auth-client.ts uses NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL which is not listed in the .env template (falls back to localhost so non-fatal). No sandbox-infeasible commands. `npx prisma db push` needs DATABASE_URL but that's documented.
evidence.completeness: All six pieces present: (a) Google + Resend acquisition with URLs/menu paths; (b) bash install block; (c) explicit .env template; (d) server lib/auth.ts + route handler; (e) login page + dashboard tsx; (f) testing procedure section. NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL referenced but not listed — minor.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only links are console.cloud.google.com and resend.com — no better-auth.com/docs URL cited anywhere near the code. No canonical official-docs anchoring for the primary integration.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable=true; long-tail handling applied — internal consistency strong, version not explicitly pinned, scored 4 on correctness. NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL mismatch noted but defaults safely so completeness not capped.
